mapper.select: SELECT A.ORDER_ID, A.ORDER_DATE, A.AMOUNT AS ORDER_AMOUNT, B.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, (A.AMOUNT - B.PAYMENT_AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT_DIFF FROM ORDERS A LEFT JOIN PAYMENTS B ON A.ORDER_ID = B.ORDER_ID WHERE A.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchBgnDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (B.ORDER_ID IS NULL OR A.AMOUNT != B.PAYMENT_AMOUNT OR B.PAYMENT_STATUS != 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY A.ORDER_DATE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS A LEFT JOIN PAYMENTS B ON A.ORDER_ID = B.ORDER_ID WHERE A.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchBgnDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (B.ORDER_ID IS NULL OR A.AMOUNT != B.PAYMENT_AMOUNT OR B.PAYMENT_STATUS != 'COMPLETED')
